Careers · Open Roles

Platform Engineer

Type: Contract · Location: Remote

Role Overview

We are seeking a Platform Engineer to help design and build internal platforms, developer tooling, and infrastructure systems used by client environments.

This role focuses on improving reliability, automation, and scalability of systems.

Responsibilities

  • Design platform architecture
  • Implement infrastructure as code
  • Build internal tooling and automation
  • Improve deployment pipelines
  • Monitor and optimise system performance

Required Experience

  • Experience with cloud platforms (Azure / AWS)
  • Infrastructure as code (Terraform, Bicep, or similar)
  • Automation tooling
  • Understanding of distributed systems

Nice to Have

  • Kubernetes or container platforms
  • CI/CD systems (GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps)
  • Monitoring and observability platforms

How to Apply

Contact us at hello@repasscloud.com and include your CV and a short 2–5 minute introduction video explaining your experience and projects.
